module_mood_contract: Boris-flat technical register with one Rory reframe at the open. Supplementary opt-in: software-engineer IC reads as take-home reference. Expected state: 'I understand context efficiency as a quality lever; I have three concrete moves; I've been inoculated against folklore figures.' No arc obligation; no mood-floor sequence pressure.

rules_evaluated.evidence: Maintainer block explicitly states 'Boris-flat for the mechanism, one Rory reframe at the open.' Body opens with the reframe ('Token efficiency sounds like a cost problem. That framing is mostly wrong') and sustains Boris-flat register throughout. Trace phase 1 mood_score 8/10; close 8/10. Contract held.

No punitive framing anywhere. 'The folklore' section names wrong models without shaming the practitioner who holds them. 'Almost nobody publishes their numbers' = epistemic uncertainty, not failure attribution. Persona reads with curiosity, not guilt.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with discipline, not failure mode.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Opening frames 'signal-to-noise' and 'context engineering' as positive disciplines. The 'folklore' section header names the category as folklore (not 'common mistakes' or 'errors to avoid'). Failure modes (bloated CLAUDE.md, wide fan-out) appear as negative cases under a positive discipline frame.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity — no front-running, Big Idea fidelity, module-to-module arc, mood doesn't resolve early.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Front-run check: supplementary does not name Huryn's three-block frame, STRIDE, or M5 Ronacher packaging — all downstream teaching moments intact. Big Idea fidelity: AE101 theme 'compounding engineering' and 'memory compounds, context feeds it' (strategy doc §Terminology) are honoured — body distinguishes durable moves from folklore explicitly, consistent with the compounding-over-chat-shaped-work thesis. Mood doesn't resolve early: no arc position; no downstream module's teaching moment pre-empted. Module-to-module arc: supplementary carries no arc obligation; close ('Now go clean your window') is a practical send-off, not a hook to a named next module — appropriate for reference register.
Rule 5 governs Key Concepts bullets in module files. Supplementary reference pages carry no Key Concepts section. N/A.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Body teaches the work; no authored conversations or trainer cues.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No group-share, discuss-with, pause-cue, or room-harvest sentence anywhere in the body above the maintainer block. Every sentence is about the work (tokens, moves, window, cost calc). Closing aside is an authorial wink in the text, not a cohort-management cue.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
rules_evaluated.evidence: The single prompt block ('Put a number on it', lines 25-31) is fenced and self-contained. Body prose around it ('Ask Claude to price the bloat') is a one-sentence action lead-in, not the forcing function itself. The prompt does the teaching; body is scaffolding. No count-scripts or scripted-reaction prose found.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Meta-frame lectures are closers, not openers.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Not a lecture file. Supplementary progressive reference; lecture placement rules don't apply to this surface.
Not a lecture; supplementary opt-in reference. Lecture dosage rules don't apply.
